name: Kaanada
notes: Janya of Kharaharapriya (22nd melakarta); shadava-sampurna vakra bhasanga raga; arohana: S R2 G2 M1 D2 N2 S (P absent in ascent), avarohana: S N2 P M1 G2 M1 R2 S; characteristic double-touch G2-M1 in descent; anya svara: N3 (kakali) intrudes as bhasanga element; svakiya N2 belongs to parent mela; distinct from Kannada (mela 29, Shankarabharanam janya) which uses G3 and N3; associated with Tyagaraja kritis Sri Narada and Yee Vasudha
